summary:
- Restored the missing `avatar_url`, `bio`, and `location` fields in the v2 payload so it remains backward compatible with v1 while keeping the newer attributes (`department`, `phone_number`, `is_active`). `app/models.go:19`
- Updated `InternalUser.ToV2()` to populate the reinstated fields and refreshed the struct comment to describe the compatibility guarantee. `app/models.go:68`

- Tests: `./test.sh` ✅

Next: 1) Rebuild/redeploy the API server if needed so clients pick up the corrected schema.
